previous_definition:
create or replace view VW_EVENT_FUNNEL(
	EVENT_DATE,
	USER_ID,
	PAGE_VIEWS,
	ADD_TO_CARTS,
	CHECKOUTS,
	PURCHASES,
	CONVERSION_RATE
) as
SELECT 
    TO_DATE(e1.PAYLOAD:"timestamp"::STRING) AS EVENT_DATE,
    e1.PAYLOAD:"user_id"::STRING AS USER_ID,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN LOWER(e1.PAYLOAD:"event_type"::STRING) LIKE '%view%' THEN e1.PAYLOAD:"session_id"::STRING END) AS PAGE_VIEWS,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN LOWER(e1.PAYLOAD:"event_type"::STRING) LIKE '%cart%' THEN e1.PAYLOAD:"session_id"::STRING END) AS ADD_TO_CARTS,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN LOWER(e1.PAYLOAD:"event_type"::STRING) LIKE '%check%' THEN e1.PAYLOAD:"session_id"::STRING END) AS CHECKOUTS,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN LOWER(e1.PAYLOAD:"event_type"::STRING) LIKE '%purchase%' THEN e1.PAYLOAD:"session_id"::STRING END) AS PURCHASES,
    CASE 
        WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN LOWER(e1.PAYLOAD:"event_type"::STRING) LIKE '%view%' THEN e1.PAYLOAD:"session_id"::STRING END) > 0
        THEN ROUND(
            COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN LOWER(e1.PAYLOAD:"event_type"::STRING) LIKE '%purchase%' THEN e1.PAYLOAD:"session_id"::STRING END) * 100.0 /
            COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN LOWER(e1.PAYLOAD:"event_type"::STRING) LIKE '%view%' THEN e1.PAYLOAD:"session_id"::STRING END)
        , 2)
        ELSE 0
    END AS CONVERSION_RATE
FROM HAFID_OPTIM_CLONE_1.PIPELINE_RAW.RAW_EVENTS e1
WHERE e1._LOADED_AT >= DATEADD('day', -90, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP())
GROUP BY 1, 2;
executed_sql:
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW HAFID_OPTIM_CLONE_1.PIPELINE_MART.VW_EVENT_FUNNEL AS
WITH base_events AS (
    SELECT
        -- Normalize event date and timestamp
        TO_DATE(e.PAYLOAD:"timestamp"::STRING)                        AS event_date,
        TO_TIMESTAMP_NTZ(e.PAYLOAD:"timestamp"::STRING)               AS event_ts,

        -- Extract core identifiers
        e.PAYLOAD:"user_id"::STRING                                  AS user_id,
        e.PAYLOAD:"session_id"::STRING                               AS session_id,

        -- Normalize event type to lowercase once for reuse
        LOWER(e.PAYLOAD:"event_type"::STRING)                         AS event_type
    FROM HAFID_OPTIM_CLONE_1.PIPELINE_RAW.RAW_EVENTS e
    WHERE e._LOADED_AT >= DATEADD('day', -90, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP())
),
-- Classify events into funnel stages using precomputed LOWER(event_type)
classified AS (
    SELECT
        event_date,
        user_id,
        session_id,
        event_ts,
        event_type,
        CASE WHEN event_type LIKE '%view%'     THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_view,
        CASE WHEN event_type LIKE '%cart%'     THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_cart,
        CASE WHEN event_type LIKE '%check%'    THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_checkout,
        CASE WHEN event_type LIKE '%purchase%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_purchase
    FROM base_events
),
-- Aggregate to user-session-day level to determine whether each stage occurred
session_stage AS (
    SELECT
        event_date,
        user_id,
        session_id,
        MAX(is_view)     AS has_view,
        MAX(is_cart)     AS has_cart,
        MAX(is_checkout) AS has_checkout,
        MAX(is_purchase) AS has_purchase
    FROM classified
    GROUP BY event_date, user_id, session_id
),
-- Daily funnel counts
daily_funnel AS (
    SELECT
        event_date,
        COUNT(*)                              AS sessions_total,
        SUM(has_view)                         AS sessions_view,
        SUM(CASE WHEN has_view = 1 AND has_cart = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)      AS sessions_view_to_cart,
        SUM(CASE WHEN has_view = 1 AND has_checkout = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)  AS sessions_view_to_checkout,
        SUM(CASE WHEN has_view = 1 AND has_purchase = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS sessions_view_to_purchase
    FROM session_stage
    GROUP BY event_date
)
SELECT
    event_date,
    sessions_total,
    sessions_view,
    sessions_view_to_cart,
    sessions_view_to_checkout,
    sessions_view_to_purchase,

    -- Conversion rates guarded by NULLIF to avoid division by zero
    CASE
        WHEN sessions_view > 0 THEN
            ROUND(sessions_view_to_cart    / NULLIF(sessions_view::FLOAT, 0), 4)
        ELSE 0
    END AS view_to_cart_conversion_rate,

    CASE
        WHEN sessions_view > 0 THEN
            ROUND(sessions_view_to_checkout / NULLIF(sessions_view::FLOAT, 0), 4)
        ELSE 0
    END AS view_to_checkout_conversion_rate,

    CASE
        WHEN sessions_view > 0 THEN
            ROUND(sessions_view_to_purchase / NULLIF(sessions_view::FLOAT, 0), 4)
        ELSE 0
    END AS view_to_purchase_conversion_rate
FROM daily_funnel
